shakshi: Tymona met — Dryad, Nexiott's exception, in her own territory in the Dryad zone of Mercurie
The player fought on Tymona's ground — the Dryad zone of Mercurie, her territory
The fight to submission began — not to the death, to the point where she will speak
The player won — Tymona will speak now
The player was beaten — the confession does not come, Nexiott's source stays hidden
The affair confirmed — the intelligence pipeline that fed 0028 has a name and a face now
Nexiott knew about Sophia through Tymona — the 0028 loop closes, the source of his intelligence about the Assassin order named
A Dryad who hates humans made one exception, and that exception fed the war machine — the player may or may not register the full weight of that
The player was fooled about Nexiott for two in-game years — the title lands, everything they understood about him was shaped by what he chose to reveal
